stories.title: Perfect team fits for 14 remaining NFL free agents...
stories.summary: Let's find new homes for 14 players who are still available, including Deebo Samuel, Joey Bosa, Stefon Diggs and Jadeveon Clowney.

stories.title: If the Aaron Rodgers offense didn't work in 2025, ...
stories.summary: Does Rodgers have anything left? And can running it back actually work for Pittsburgh?

stories.title: Pelicans hiring Mosley as head coach, sources say
stories.summary: The Pelicans are hiring Jamahl Mosley on a five-year contract as their new head coach, sources told ESPN. He spent the past five seasons in Orlando, going 189-221.

stories.title: Rory fires back at fan after 'USA' shout from gall...
stories.summary: Rory McIlroy's frustrating final round at the PGA Championship on Sunday boiled over with an angry exchange with a fan after a "U-S-A!" shout from the gallery at Aronimink Golf Club.

stories.title: Sources: Mourinho agrees two-year Madrid deal
stories.summary: José Mourinho has agreed to a two-year contract to return to Real Madrid, sources have told ESPN Brazil.
